translationTabs.translationHint: Translation. The {{sourceLanguage}} text in the first tab is the canonical version.

name: Name
somethingWentWrongBody: An error occurred. Please try refreshing the page.
errorSupportHint: If this keeps happening, contact support with the time this occurred.
databaseError: A database error occurred while trying to {{operation}} data at {{path}}.
typeToSearchOrCreate: Type to search or create new...
orCreateNew: Or save to create as new
restaurantSettingsSubtitle: Kitchen-wide configuration that applies across all recipes.
restaurantNamePlaceholder: The name displayed on reports and labels
zipCodeHelper: Used for sourcing nearby suppliers. Not shared externally except with sourcing queries.
standingDisclaimerBody: Allergens that the kitchen may cross-contact across all recipes, regardless of whether a specific recipe contains them. These will be shown as "may contain" on every recipe in addition to the recipe's derived allergens.

dataMigration.title: Data Migration
dataMigration.description: One-time: upgrade all recipes to the current schema version. Safe to run multiple times — only recipes that need updating will be touched.
dataMigration.result: Migrated: {{migrated}} recipes. Lifted legacy ingredients: {{lifted}}. Skipped (already current): {{skipped}}.
dataMigration.failedToast: Migration failed. See console for details.

roleMigration.success: Role tagging complete: {{recipesUpdated}} recipes updated, {{ingredientsTagged}} ingredients tagged, {{ambiguous}} ambiguous (skipped).

crossContactRecompute.title: Cross-contact recompute
crossContactRecompute.description: Recompute cross-contact allergen risks across every recipe. Run after bulk imports or station changes so a risk introduced on one recipe propagates to others sharing its station. Safe to run multiple times.
crossContactRecompute.failedToast: Cross-contact recompute failed. See console for details.
